name: Burston
description: The Burston fires 3-round bursts, which provides a balance between the lethality of automatic rifles and the accuracy of semi-automatic rifles.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The Burston fires 3-round bursts, which provides a balance between the lethality of automatic rifles and the accuracy of semi-automatic rifles.

components.name: Ferrite
components.description:
Alloy pellets used in Grineer manufacturing.

Location: Mercury, Earth, Lua, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Morphics
components.description:
An amorphous solid. Possibly Orokin technology.

Location: Mercury, Mars, Phobos, Europa, and Pluto

components.name: Polymer Bundle
components.description:
A hard, thermoplastic casing. Manufactured by Corpus.

Location: Mercury, Venus, and Uranus

patchlogs.name: Update 29.10.0: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Burston Prime’s magazine getting stuck to your left hand if the Solstice Skin is equipped.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.4.0
patchlogs.changes: Changed Burston building requirements to 600 Ferrite instead of 600 Nano Spores.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.16.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed reload sounds not playing when applying the Solstice Skin to the Burston Prime.

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: U2.1
patchlogs.changes: Updated the Burston mesh in the Stalker diorama.

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: Hotfix 11
patchlogs.changes: The Burston has received a visual rework and new reload animation!

patchlogs.name: Update 17.9.0
patchlogs.changes: The following Mod has been added the Conclave:Triple Tap (Burston)

patchlogs.name: Update 17.2.4
patchlogs.changes: Burston Prime damage decreased in PvP

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.changes: The Burston, Opticor, Miter, Hind, Grinlok, Marelok, Twin Gremlins, Tiberon, Tetra, Buzlok, Attica, Vasto, Seer and Supra are now available for use in Conclave.  This list includes all weapon variants.

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Archwing
patchlogs.changes: Burston Prime: Gilded Truth: adds 20% fire rate

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.11
patchlogs.fixes: Damage multipliers for the Amprex, Brakk, Drakgoon, Karak, Hind, Marelok, Mutalist Quanta, Tysis, AkLato, Burston Prime, Lato, Braton, Tetra, Tigris all normalized (no more arbitrary multipliers).

patchlogs.name: Update 12.3.0: The Grustrag Three
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Burston Prime Blueprint not being tradeable.

patchlogs.name: Update 9: Vor's Revenge
patchlogs.fixes:
Refined the tint options on the Burston, Viper, Gram, Furis, Afuris, Dera, Furax, and Boltor.
Burston

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed mis-aligned muzzle flash on Burston weapon.
